content.full_text:
County of
FRESNO                                    F P P C                                    Edward W. Hunt
                                          MAY 6 2 35 PM'06                           District Attorney


April 29, 1986




Fair Political Practice Commission
1100 "K" Street
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Sir:

A concerned citizen of our county has posed a problem which I have not been
able to find any law on the matter. This letter is being written with the
hopes that your department may be aware of some authority concerning this
problem or that none exists.

A small town newspaper had recently donated free campaign ads for candidates
of its choice but refused to donate equally free ads to opponents of those
candidates.

Is there any law on this matter? I've looked and found nothing with the
exception of Elections Code section 11703 which seems to exempt the news
media. The problem is that section does not specifically cover the problem
posed.

Any information on this would be greatly appreciated.

Very truly yours,

EDWARD W. HUNT                           5/28/86
DISTRICT ATTORNEY                        Per telephone conversation
                                         with Mr. Kiraly, we know
                                         of nothing requiring newspapers
BY   John 3 Kiraly                       to provide equal time.
     JOHN Z. KIRALY
     ASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY         Carle W.

JZK/nct

cc: Mike Magarian
     0634U



7th Floor, Courthouse/1100 Van Ness Avenue/Fresno, California 93721/(209) 488-3141
Equal Employment Opportunity — Affirmative Action — Handicap Emslover

i 86-154
